get.description:
Summary:
- 4 tests were collected and run in `test_employees_id_get.py`.
- 2 tests failed due to the API returning HTTP 200 instead of expected 400/404 for malformed or invalid ID endpoints.
- 2 tests encountered errors at setup caused by missing `api.json` file needed for Swagger schema validation.
- No tests passed. Total time: 1.60s.

post.description: All four tests in `test_employees_post.py` failed due to a `ValueError` in `conftest.py` at line 62. The error occurs when merging test data: `dictionary update sequence element #0 has length 4; 2 is required`. This indicates a problem with the structure of data returned by `load_endpoint_test_data`, which is incompatible with the expected dictionary format. No tests passed; all failures were caused by the same data processing issue.

get.description:
Summary:

Out of 5 tests run, 3 failed and 2 passed.  
- Two tests failed due to a missing required test data file: `endpoint_test_data.json`.
- One test failed because the /employees endpoint did not return the expected 400 status for an invalid query; it returned 200 instead.
- The failures indicate both setup issues (missing data) and a possible bug in endpoint input validation.
